name: Optimizely Setup
description: Guided setup for a new Optimizely project. Determines platform (CMS 12 or SaaS CMS), establishes project conventions, configures reference material, and produces a project context document.

name: Optimizely Reference
description: Comprehensive Optimizely platform reference covering CMS 12, SaaS CMS, Content Graph, Commerce, DXP Cloud, CMP, and Opal AI.

name: Graph Query Helper
description: Content Graph query design assistance. Authentication patterns, query optimisation, cached templates, search types, pagination strategies.

name: Visual Builder Patterns
description: Visual Builder composition patterns. Experience/Section/Element hierarchy, Styles, Display Templates, Blueprints, Contracts.

name: Integration Patterns
description: Integration architecture patterns. Commerce-CMS, CMP-CMS, Opal AI, third-party systems, event-driven patterns.

name: Content Governance
description: Content governance patterns. Editorial workflows, multi-language governance, role design, content lifecycle management.

name: Multi-Site Architecture
description: Multi-site and multi-language architecture. Site definitions, language management, multi-brand, multi-market patterns.

name: Security Patterns
description: Security patterns for Optimizely. RBAC, API auth, Content Graph security, DXP Cloud, Commerce PCI, Opal AI guardrails.

name: Testing Strategy
description: Testing strategy patterns. .NET unit testing, Content Graph validation, E2E testing, migration testing, Opal AI evaluation.

name: Docs Search
description: Search official Optimizely documentation. Navigation guide for CMS 12, SaaS CMS, Content Graph, Commerce, Opal docs.

name: Source Audit
description: Audit source CMS for migration to Optimizely. Content inventory, quality scoring, complexity assessment, effort estimation.

name: Content Model
description: Design structured content model. CMS-agnostic then validated against target platform (CMS 12 PageData/BlockData or SaaS CMS Visual Builder patterns).

name: Platform Assessment
description: Assess which Optimizely platform fits. CMS 12 vs SaaS CMS comparison, Commerce readiness, CMP and Opal AI opportunities.

name: Architecture
description: Design Optimizely technical architecture in ADR format. Platform choice, component model, integration patterns, deployment architecture.

name: Migration Plan
description: Create phased migration plan. Content model mapping, wave plan, effort estimates, URL redirect strategy, content freeze schedule.

name: Performance Audit
description: Audit implementation for performance. CDN, caching, Content Graph queries, SSR/SSG, image delivery, DXP Cloud config.

name: Build Component
description: Build production-ready Optimizely component. CMS 12 (C# BlockData/PageData + MVC views) or SaaS CMS (content type + React component). Content model first.

name: Headless Implementation
description: Implement headless front-end consuming SaaS CMS via Content Graph. Next.js setup, query layer, Visual Builder rendering, preview integration.

name: Opal Configure
description: Configure Opal AI agents and workflows. Agent design, tool configuration, instructions framework, RAG, evaluations, deployment.

name: Migration Execute
description: Execute migration waves per approved plan. Content transformation, bulk import, Content Graph validation, wave exit criteria.

name: Code Review
description: Review Optimizely code for quality, performance, and standards. CMS 12 .NET patterns or SaaS CMS headless patterns.

name: Migration Validate
description: Validate migrated content and prepare go-live. Completeness, quality, URL redirects, SEO, performance baseline, cutover plan.

name: CMP Setup
description: Configure Optimizely CMP. Campaign templates, editorial calendars, approval routing, CMS integration, analytics.
